children.label: A
children.text: are restorative or regenerative by design;

children.label: B
children.text: enable resources used in such processes and activities to maintain their highest values for as long as possible; and

children.label: C
children.text: aim for the elimination of waste through the superior design of materials, products, and systems (including business models).

children.heading: EPA Administrator
children.label: 2 EPA Administrator
children.text: The term “EPA Administrator” means the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency.

children.heading: Indian Tribe
children.label: 3 Indian Tribe
children.text: The term “Indian Tribe” has the meaning given the term “Indian tribe” in , without regard to capitalization.section 5304 of title 25

children.heading: Interagency Marine Debris Coordinating Committee
children.label: 4 Interagency Marine Debris Coordinating Committee
children.text: The term “Interagency Marine Debris Coordinating Committee” means the Interagency Marine Debris Coordinating Committee established under .section 1954 of this title

children.heading: Marine debris
children.label: 5 Marine debris
children.text: The term “marine debris” has the meaning given that term in section 1981 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: marine debris caused by a natural event, including a tsunami, flood, landslide, hurricane, or other natural source;

children.label: B
children.text: distinct, nonrecurring marine debris, including derelict vessel groundings and container spills, that have immediate or long-term impacts on habitats with high ecological, economic, or human-use values; or

children.label: C
children.text: marine debris caused by an intentional or grossly negligent act or acts that causes substantial economic or environmental harm.

children.heading: Nonprofit organization
children.label: 7 Nonprofit organization
children.text: The term “nonprofit organization” means an organization that is described in and exempt from tax under section 501(a) of such title.section 501(c) of title 26

children.label: A
children.text: collection;

children.label: B
children.text: transport;

children.label: C
children.text: safe disposal of waste that cannot be recovered, reused, recycled, repaired, or refurbished; and

children.label: D
children.text: systems and processes related to post-use materials that can be recovered, reused, recycled, repaired, or refurbished.

children.label: A
children.text: a State;

children.label: B
children.text: an Indian Tribe;

children.label: C
children.text: the District of Columbia;

children.label: D
children.text: a territory or possession of the United States; or

children.label: E
children.text: any political subdivision of an entity described in subparagraphs (A) through (D).

children.heading: Under Secretary
children.label: 10 Under Secretary
children.text: The term “Under Secretary” means the Under Secretary of Commerce for Oceans and Atmosphere and Administrator of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration.
